Name: UInputKeySelector
Description: A widget for selecting a single key or a single key with a modifier.

Variables.Name: WidgetStyle
Variables.Description: The button style used at runtime

Variables.Name: TextStyle
Variables.Description: The button style used at runtime

Variables.Name: Margin
Variables.Description: The amount of blank space around the text used to display the currently selected key.

Variables.Name: KeySelectionText
Variables.Description: Sets the text which is displayed while selecting keys.

Variables.Name: NoKeySpecifiedText
Variables.Description: Sets the text to display when no key text is available or not selecting a key.

Variables.Name: bAllowModifierKeys
Variables.Description:
When true modifier keys such as control and alt are allowed in the 
	 input chord representing the selected key, if false modifier keys are ignored.

Variables.Name: bAllowGamepadKeys
Variables.Description: When true gamepad keys are allowed in the input chord representing the selected key, otherwise they are ignored.

Variables.Name: EscapeKeys
Variables.Description: When true gamepad keys are allowed in the input chord representing the selected key, otherwise they are ignored.

Functions.Name: SetKeySelectionText
Functions.Description: Sets the text which is displayed while selecting keys.

Functions.Name: SetNoKeySpecifiedText
Functions.Description: Sets the text to display when no key text is available or not selecting a key.

Functions.Name: SetAllowModifierKeys
Functions.Description: Sets whether or not modifier keys are allowed in the selected key.

Functions.Name: SetAllowGamepadKeys
Functions.Description: Sets whether or not gamepad keys are allowed in the selected key.

Functions.Name: GetIsSelectingKey
Functions.Description: Returns true if the widget is currently selecting a key, otherwise returns false.

Functions.Name: SetTextBlockVisibility
Functions.Description: Sets the visibility of the text block.

Delegate.Name: OnKeySelected
Delegate.Description: Called whenever a new key is selected by the user.

Delegate.Name: OnIsSelectingKeyChanged
Delegate.Description: Called whenever the key selection mode starts or stops.
